entries.title: ON THE FIRST BOOK OF KINGS 17:2 on first-kings 17:17
entries.excerpt: Observe carefully the tears of that woman, and see her humility in her grief, because she does not at all blame the judgment of God or rise against the prophet. In the humility of her intellect, she recognizes that that sentence struck her because of her guilt, and she says to the prophet, "You have come to me to bring my sin to remembrance."
